nasb.text: “I have heard what the prophets have said who prophesy falsely in My name, saying, ‘I had a dream, I had a dream!’

esv.text: I have heard what the prophets have said who prophesy lies in my name, saying, ‘I have dreamed, I have dreamed!’

cnv.text: “那些先知所說的話我都聽見了，他們冒我的名說虛假的預言：‘我作了夢！我作了夢！’

ccb.text: 我听见假先知奉我的名说，‘上帝托梦给我了！上帝托梦给我了！’
